item.title: About
item.dc:creator: estheticaspafurniture
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row overlay_row="" el_class="aboutHead"][vc_column el_class="headingLeft"][wolfe_title_desc_header title="About us" sub_title="Who we are" font_size_sub_title="" short_desc="Welcome to Esthetica – Your pinnacle of elegance and functionality in Spa, Wellness, and Healthcare Furniture. Established in 2011, Esthetica takes pride in being a distinguished manufacturer of premium spa and wellness furniture. Over the years, we have evolved into a leading brand, expanding our expertise to include the production of top-quality Medical Furniture." font_size_desc="" title_color="" sub_title_color="" short_desc_color=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row" parallax="content-moving" parallax_image="1773" overlay_row="rgba(0,0,0,0.6)" el_class="bgCover teamCall" css=".vc_custom_1465548756884{padding-top: 15% !important;padding-bottom: 15% !important;}"][vc_column][no_simple_title title="We are a team of professionals and skilled craftsmen committed to producing high-quality Treatment tables for spas, wellness centres and medical clinics." title_font_size="" title_color="#ffffff" undeline="no_underliner" title_align="align_center"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row overlay_row="" css=".vc_custom_1465561764556{margin-top: 10% !important;}"][vc_column width="2/3" offset="vc_col-sm-offset-2" el_class="subHead"][no_simple_title title="We deliver a diverse product range on time, every time with quick lead times using modern woodworking machines" title_font_size="" undeline="no_underliner" title_align="align_center"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row" overlay_row="" css=".vc_custom_1465561607675{margin-bottom: 10% !important;}"][vc_column][vc_column_text css="" el_class="font-size18"]Our commitment to excellence has made us a trusted choice for distributors, spa management companies, and spa consultants worldwide, with our products being loved, used, and recommended on a global scale.

At the heart of our success is a state-of-the-art manufacturing facility spanning 34,000 square feet, equipped with cutting-edge technology and operated by a skilled team of more than 100 dedicated professionals.

Our mission at Esthetica is clear – to manufacture top-of-the-line furniture for the spa, wellness, and healthcare sectors.  We prioritize using the finest raw materials and adhering to the best manufacturing practices, ensuring that each product not only meets but exceeds industry standards.

What sets us apart is our relentless pursuit of perfection. We go beyond merely crafting furniture; we curate experiences. Every design is a thoughtful blend of aesthetics and practicality, resulting in furniture that elevates the ambiance of spas, wellness centers, and healthcare facilities alike.

Esthetica remains dedicated to pushing the boundaries of what is possible in spa and healthcare furniture. We invite you to explore our range of meticulously crafted products and join us in the pursuit of creating spaces that redefine comfort, style, and sophistication.

Esthetica – Where Form Meets Function, and Luxury is a Standard.[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text][wonderplugin_carousel id="1"][/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row" parallax="content-moving" parallax_image="1439" overlay_row="" el_class="aboutCall"][vc_column][no_simple_title title="We are always ready to work for exciting and ambitious clients. If you love our products, please get in touch." title_font_size="" undeline="no_underliner" title_align="align_center"][vc_empty_space height="50px"][vc_btn title="Let's Collaborate" shape="square" color="inverse" size="lg" align="center" css_animation="fadeInUp" css="" link="url:https%3A%2F%2Fwww.spafurniture.in%2Fcontact-us%2F|title:Let's%20Collaborate" el_class="Let's Collaborate"][/vc_column][/vc_row]

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Esthetica supplies spa furniture to top wellness brands worldwide, expertly crafted for superior comfort, long-lasting durability, and luxury design. Visit Now!
About Esthetica | Premium Spa Furniture Manufacturer
[{"keyword":"spa furniture manufacturers in india","score":49},{"keyword":"spa furniture manufacturers","score":62}]

LTD Plot No. 249,Sector 6,IMT  Manesar, Gurgaon-122050,Haryana,India info@spafurniture.in +91-124-4003120,4035516,+91-9873144051[/vc_column_text][no_contact_info find_us="" address="" email="" phone="" facebook="https://www.facebook.com/estheticaspasalonfurniture" rss="https://www.instagram.com/estheticaspafurniture/" instagram="https://www.linkedin.com/company/esthetica-spa-&-salon-resources-pvt-ltd" class="``fa" whatsapp="" contact_title="" contact_title_desc="" twitter="" css=".vc_custom_1737548881286{margin-top: -70px !important;}"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content_no_spaces" overlay_row="" css=".vc_custom_1466601429396{padding-right: 0px !important;padding-left: 0px !important;}"][vc_column css=".vc_custom_1465033001687{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"][vc_raw_html css=".vc_custom_1731041559860{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"][/vc_raw_html][/vc_column][/vc_row]

item.title: Home
item.dc:creator: estheticaspafurniture
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content" full_height="yes" equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row="" el_class="proRotate home-page-graphic-for-nov"][vc_column el_class="vertMid"][vc_column_text css_animation="none" css=""] [/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="bottom-to-top" el_class="proText"]
Featured Here The Shirodhara Massage Bed
[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row" parallax="content-moving" parallax_image="1439" overlay_row="" el_class="callAction"][vc_column el_class="callBtn"][no_simple_title title="Combining design innovation with aesthetics to redefine the standards of spa and wellness furniture. Our spa furniture adheres to the highest international quality standards, reflecting our unwavering commitment to delivering top-tier products." title_font_size="" undeline="no_underliner" title_align="align_center"][wolfe_button text_button="OUR BACKGROUND" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/about-us/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row overlay_row="" el_class="headingSec"][vc_column width="1/3" el_class="headingLeft"][vc_column_text css=""]

OUR PRODUCTS

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

Crafted till Perfection

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width="2/3" el_class="headingDesc"][vc_column_text css_animation="bottom-to-top" css=""]Explore our extensive collection, featuring high-end electric massage beds, specialized Spa Beds, Hydraulic Massage Tables, Spa Treatment Tables,  Ayurvedic Massage Tables, Spa Trolleys, Spa Stools, Relaxation Loungers, Ayurveda Panchakarma Table, Shirodhara & Abhyanga Table, Foot Reflexology Chairs, Manicure Tables, and Luxury Pedicure Chairs. Each piece is meticulously crafted to enhance the ambience and functionality of your spa.As one of the leading spa furniture manufacturers, massage table manufacturers, and massage bed suppliers in India, we offer customizable luxury spa furniture solutions that redefine the standards of comfort and design in modern spa furniture.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row overlay_row="" el_class="productC"][vc_column][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row="" el_class="custom-header"][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg1" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="4731" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#massage-beds"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft productCat vMiddle" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

Massage Beds

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="bottom-to-top" css=""]

Massage beds are the centre of any treatment room. Premium hardwood, comfy cushioning, and adjustable settings make our massage beds a cut above the rest. Massages, facials, and Ayurvedic treatments all benefit from using these. As experienced massage table manufacturers, we offer a range of designs, from Electric to stationary wooden models, as per your operational needs.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/massage-beds/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row="" el_class="custom-header"][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft productCat vMiddle" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

Spa Stools

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="bottom-to-top" css=""]

Spa stools are a versatile addition to any wellness setting. Our spa stools are compact, portable, and comfortable, supporting therapists during long working hours. You can adjust their height, and they roll easily between rooms.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/spa-stools/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg3" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="1537" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#spa-stools"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row="" el_class="custom-header"][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg2" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="1970" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#spa-trolleys"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle headingLeft productCat" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

Spa Trolleys

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="bottom-to-top" css=""]

Keep your essential tools and products organized and within reach with our stylish and functional spa trolleys. Massage oils, towels, everything moves effortlessly.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/spa-trolleys/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row="" el_class="custom-header"][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft productCat vMiddle" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

Pedicure & Manicure

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="bottom-to-top" css=""]

Create a relaxing nail care experience with our comfortably designed pedicure and manicure setups. Easy to clean, these units prioritize both client comfort and technician efficiency. Hygiene is a breeze!

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/pedicure-manicure/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg5" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="4703" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#pedicure-manicure"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row="" el_class="custom-header"][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg7" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="2685" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#loungers"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft productCat vMiddle" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

Loungers

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="bottom-to-top" css=""]

Create serene relaxation areas with our elegant loungers. Unwind before and after treatments on these comfortably designed loungers. You'll feel weightless and stress-free – pure bliss!

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/spa-relaxation-loungers/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row="" el_class="custom-header"][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle headingLeft productCat" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

Salon Furniture

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="bottom-to-top" css=""]

Our salon furniture products include styling chairs, shampoo stations, and treatment beds. Your salon will be more efficient and stylish with our products.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/salon-furniture/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg4" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="6345" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" css="" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#salon-furniture"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row="" el_class="custom-header"][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg6" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="3941" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#accessories"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle headingLeft productCat" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

Accessories

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="bottom-to-top" css=""]

Looking to improve your space? Our high-quality accessories include headrests, towel warmers, and footrests. These will help you do just that. Small changes can have a surprisingly large impact on the overall treatment experience.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/spa-accessories/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row" equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" parallax="content-moving" parallax_image="1484" overlay_row="" el_class="specialSec"][vc_column el_class="headingLeft center"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css="" el_class="custom-content"]

OUR SPECIALITY

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css="" el_class="custom-content"]

Customised to your aesthetics

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css="" el_class="custom-content"]

Our manufacturing unit empowers you to personalize your furniture down to the last detail. Choose from a spectrum of wood stain colours and upholstery options to create a piece that seamlessly integrates with your space. We can even customise the sizes as per your space requirements.This level of customization is ideal for spas and wellness centres seeking to align their interiors, treatment offerings, and client preferences. As experienced spa furniture manufacturers, we ensure that each product not only fits your space but also enhances its purpose and ambience.

[/vc_column_text][vc_row_inner overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="centerBox" width="1/6" offset="vc_col-sm-offset-2 vc_col-xs-4"][vc_single_image image="1893" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="bottom-to-top"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="centerBox" width="1/6" offset="vc_col-sm-offset-1 vc_col-xs-4"][vc_single_image image="1895" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="bottom-to-top"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="centerBox" width="1/6" offset="vc_col-sm-offset-1 vc_col-xs-4"][vc_single_image image="1894" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="bottom-to-top"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content" equal_height="yes" overlay_row="" el_class="headingSec howWhat"][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft center"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

HOW WE DO

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

What We Do

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

Esthetica specializes in precision manufacturing luxury spa furniture, including high-end spa tables, massage bed ranges, spa treatment tables, and Ayurveda tables. We offer a comprehensive range of products tailored for hotel and resort spas. Our cutting-edge manufacturing facility boasts a modern setup. Esthetica handles every aspect of the manufacturing process with meticulous care and expertise. Your vision is our priority, and our capabilities span the entire spectrum of furniture production.

Our in-house team works closely with architects, designers, and spa consultants to deliver solutions that meet global standards. As trusted massage table manufacturers and spa table manufacturers, we combine craftsmanship with innovation to provide spa furniture that performs beautifully, day after day.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner overlay_row="" el_class="project-sec"][vc_column_inner][wolfe_client_logos autoplay_timeout="5000" img_ids="5355,5356,5357,5358,5359,5360,5361,5362,5363,5364,5365,5366,5367,5368,5369,5370,5371,5372,5373,5374,5375,5376,5377,5378,5379,5380,5381,5382,5383,5384,5385,5386,5387,5388,5389,5390,5391,5392,5393"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row" equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row="" el_class="clientsSec"][vc_column css=".vc_custom_1465560529987{padding-bottom: 40px !important;}" el_class="headingLeft center"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

OUR CLIENTS

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

Across The Globe

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

We are loved around the globe. Our products are used by World-Class spa and Hospitality brands like Marriott, WTS International, Hyatt, ITC, Six Senses, Four Seasons, Sun Siyam, Trident, Holiday Inn, Lux Resorts and many luxury spa projects across the globe.Our reputation as trusted spa furniture manufacturers is built on consistent quality, elegant design, and reliable global service. Leading wellness brands choose us not just for our products, but for the long-term value we bring to their spa environments.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_client_logos autoplay_timeout="1000" animation_delay="0.1" img_ids="4603,4599,4598,4597,4596,4595,4594,4593,4591,4590,4589,4587,4586,4585,4584,4583,4582,4581,4580,4578,4577,4576,4574,4573,4571,4570,4569,4568,4567,4565,4564,4563,4562,4561,4560,4557,4555,4554,4553,4552,4551,4550,4546,4541,4548,4547,4545"][vc_empty_space height="50px"][wolfe_button text_button="See All" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/index.php/clients/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row css=".vc_custom_1750397385122{margin-top: 50px !important;margin-bottom: 50px !important;}"][vc_column][vc_column_text css=""]

Testimonials

[/vc_column_text][vc_raw_html css=""]JTBBJTVCdHJ1c3RpbmRleCUyMG5vLXJlZ2lzdHJhdGlvbiUzRGdvb2dsZSU1RA==[/vc_raw_html][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text][/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css=""]

FAQ

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_toggle title="Can Esthetica furniture be customized to match our spa's design concept?" size="lg" custom_font_container="tag:h2|font_size:25px|text_align:left|color:%23555555" custom_google_fonts="font_family:Josefin%20Sans%3A100%2C100italic%2C300%2C300italic%2Cregular%2Citalic%2C600%2C600italic%2C700%2C700italic|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css="" use_custom_heading="true"]Yes. All Esthetica products are available in a wide range of upholstery colours, base finishes, wood veneers, and fabric options. Custom dimensions and bespoke configurations are available on request.[/vc_toggle][vc_toggle title="Are your products suitable for five-star hotel and resort spas?" size="lg" custom_font_container="tag:h2|font_size:25px|text_align:left|color:%23555555" custom_google_fonts="font_family:Josefin%20Sans%3A100%2C100italic%2C300%2C300italic%2Cregular%2Citalic%2C600%2C600italic%2C700%2C700italic|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css="" use_custom_heading="true"]Esthetica furniture is supplied to leading luxury hospitality brands including Six Senses, Raffles, Four Seasons, and Shangri-La. All products are designed to meet the operational and aesthetic demands of high-volume professional environments.[/vc_toggle][vc_toggle title="Where is Esthetica furniture manufactured?" size="lg" custom_font_container="tag:h2|font_size:25px|text_align:left|color:%23555555" custom_google_fonts="font_family:Josefin%20Sans%3A100%2C100italic%2C300%2C300italic%2Cregular%2Citalic%2C600%2C600italic%2C700%2C700italic|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css="" use_custom_heading="true"]All products are manufactured at our 34,000 sq. ft. facility in IMT Manesar, Gurgaon, India, using machinery sourced from Italy, Germany, and Taiwan.[/vc_toggle][vc_toggle title="How can I become an authorized Esthetica distributor?" size="lg" custom_font_container="tag:h2|font_size:25px|text_align:left|color:%23555555" custom_google_fonts="font_family:Josefin%20Sans%3A100%2C100italic%2C300%2C300italic%2Cregular%2Citalic%2C600%2C600italic%2C700%2C700italic|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css="" use_custom_heading="true"]We welcome enquiries from established distributors in markets where we are currently expanding. Please contact us with details of your company and territory.[/vc_toggle][vc_toggle title="Can I visit the Esthetica facility before placing an order?" size="lg" custom_font_container="tag:h2|font_size:25px|text_align:left|color:%23555555" custom_google_fonts="font_family:Josefin%20Sans%3A100%2C100italic%2C300%2C300italic%2Cregular%2Citalic%2C600%2C600italic%2C700%2C700italic|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css="" use_custom_heading="true"]Yes. We welcome visits to our manufacturing facility and showroom in IMT Manesar, Gurgaon. Please contact us to schedule an appointment.[/vc_toggle][vc_toggle title="What warranty do Esthetica products carry?" size="lg" custom_font_container="tag:h2|font_size:25px|text_align:left|color:%23555555" custom_google_fonts="font_family:Josefin%20Sans%3A100%2C100italic%2C300%2C300italic%2Cregular%2Citalic%2C600%2C600italic%2C700%2C700italic|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css="" use_custom_heading="true"]Every Esthetica product is backed by a comprehensive manufacturer's warranty: 1 year on upholstery and heating elements, 3 years on motors and electronic controls, and 5 years on the internal frame structure. All warranty claims are handled directly by our team at our manufacturing facility in IMT Manesar, Gurgaon.[/vc_toggle][vc_toggle title="What sets Esthetica's craftsmanship apart?" size="lg" custom_font_container="tag:h2|font_size:25px|text_align:left|color:%23555555" custom_google_fonts="font_family:Josefin%20Sans%3A100%2C100italic%2C300%2C300italic%2Cregular%2Citalic%2C600%2C600italic%2C700%2C700italic|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css="" use_custom_heading="true"]Every Esthetica product is built using real wood and real wood veneer — never laminates or synthetic substitutes. Structural components are precision CNC-machined, and all upholstery is hand-finished in-house by our skilled craftsmen. The result is furniture that combines manufacturing precision with genuine handcraft, built to perform in the world's most demanding luxury spa environments.[/vc_toggle][vc_toggle title="Do you ship internationally?" size="lg" custom_font_container="tag:h2|font_size:25px|text_align:left|color:%23555555" custom_google_fonts="font_family:Josefin%20Sans%3A100%2C100italic%2C300%2C300italic%2Cregular%2Citalic%2C600%2C600italic%2C700%2C700italic|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css="" use_custom_heading="true"]Yes. Esthetica ships worldwide with an established distributor network across the UK, UAE, Australia, Germany, Belgium, and the USA.[/vc_toggle][vc_toggle title="What is the typical lead time for an order?" size="lg" custom_font_container="tag:h2|font_size:25px|text_align:left|color:%23555555" custom_google_fonts="font_family:Josefin%20Sans%3A100%2C100italic%2C300%2C300italic%2Cregular%2Citalic%2C600%2C600italic%2C700%2C700italic|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css="" use_custom_heading="true"]Lead times vary by product and order volume. Standard lead time is 4–5 weeks. Custom orders may require additional time. Contact us for a confirmed timeline at the time of enquiry.[/vc_toggle][vc_toggle title="What is Esthetica’s approach to sustainability?" size="lg" custom_font_container="tag:h2|font_size:25px|text_align:left|color:%23555555" custom_google_fonts="font_family:Josefin%20Sans%3A100%2C100italic%2C300%2C300italic%2Cregular%2Citalic%2C600%2C600italic%2C700%2C700italic|font_style:400%20regular%3A400%3Anormal" css="" use_custom_heading="true"]Our commitment to sustainability is built into every stage of production. We use real wood and real wood veneer exclusively — no PVC laminates or plastic substitutes. All wood coatings are low-VOC, reducing harmful emissions during manufacturing and throughout the product’s life. Our upholstery materials are plasticiser and phthalate-free, ensuring they are safe for clients, therapists, and the environment. Packaging is plastic-free — all products are shipped in cardboard and wood packaging only.[/vc_toggle][vc_empty_space height="50px"][/vc_column][/vc_row]

item.title: Massage Tables
item.dc:creator: estheticaspafurniture
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row overlay_row=""][vc_column][ess_grid alias="product_categories"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css="" el_class="section-div-p"]

Innovating Massage Tables for an Unforgettable Experience

The wellness industry has rapidly emerged as one of the fastest-growing sectors globally, driven by increasing consumer demand for health, relaxation, and self-care services. As more people prioritize mental and physical well-being, wellness and spa resorts have become key destinations, offering a sanctuary for rejuvenation. These resorts aim to create unforgettable guest experiences, combining relaxation, luxury, and expert treatments. To enhance the overall experience, spa furniture plays a pivotal role, especially in massage tables and related spa equipment. As such, spa furniture manufacturers are continuously pushing the envelope, providing innovative, functional, and comfortable designs for their clientele.

One brand that has been at the forefront of spa furniture innovation is Esthetica, a leader in designing and manufacturing premium spa furniture for hotel and resort spas. With a commitment to crafting high-quality, functional, and aesthetically pleasing spa equipment, Esthetica has built a strong reputation in the wellness industry. Their product range is designed to cater to various types of therapeutic massages, ensuring that spa-goers enjoy a truly exceptional experience from the moment they enter the spa.

Why there is increasing demand for high-quality Spa Furniture

Wellness and spa resorts have become essential components of the tourism and hospitality industries, providing not just luxury and comfort but also health benefits. Hotels and resorts, in particular, are tapping into this growing demand by offering high-end spa services as a way to attract new guests and build customer loyalty. For many visitors, the spa experience is one of the highlights of their stay, with treatments such as massages, facials, aromatherapy, and body treatments enhancing relaxation and well-being. However, to truly stand out in the highly competitive wellness industry, resort spas need to focus on providing an experience that goes beyond the basics. This includes investing in top-notch spa furniture and equipment that elevates the quality of treatments and improves guest satisfaction.

The Role of Massage Beds in Creating a Memorable Spa Experience

Spa furniture, especially massage tables, plays a crucial role in the overall experience of guests. Not only do these pieces need to be visually appealing and complement the spa's design, but they also need to be functional, comfortable, and adaptable to various types of massages. When it comes to therapeutic massages, comfort is paramount. Guests need to feel fully relaxed and supported during their treatments, and the right spa furniture can make all the difference in achieving that state of calm.

Esthetica recognizes the need for both style and functionality in its spa tables and other spa furniture range. The brand specializes in creating high-end massage tables and other spa equipment that cater to the specific needs of wellness resorts. Whether it’s a luxurious electric massage table with integrated features or a traditional wooden massage bed, Esthetica ensures that every piece of furniture is designed with both the therapist’s and the client’s comfort in mind.

Esthetica’s Range of Premium Spa Furniture

Esthetica offers a comprehensive range of spa furniture that serves both functional and aesthetic purposes, tailored to meet the demands of modern wellness and spa resorts. Below are some of the standout products that help elevate the guest experience:

Speciality Spa Tables

One of Esthetica's signature products is their range of specialty massage tables designed to accommodate various types of treatments. From deep tissue massages to Ayurvedic therapies, these tables offer the support needed for different techniques. The furniture is engineered to provide maximum comfort for guests while maintaining ease of use for therapists.

Solid Wood Massage Beds for Professional Use

Esthetica’s solid wood massage beds combine traditional craftsmanship with modern design. These high-quality beds are built to withstand the demands of professional use while providing a luxurious feel for guests. The solid wood construction adds a touch of elegance, making these beds perfect for upscale hotel and resort spas that aim to create a timeless, classic spa experience.

Electric Spa Treatment Tables

For a more modern approach to spa furniture, Esthetica offers high-end electric spa tables that come with electronic adjustments for ease of use. These tables allow therapists to adjust the height and position of the bed, ensuring an optimal massage experience for each client. The integrated heating function in the mattress adds an extra layer of comfort, soothing muscles and enhancing relaxation during the treatment.

Low-Height Thai Massage Bed

For resorts offering Thai or other specialized massage styles, Esthetica’s low-height Thai massage bed provide the perfect solution. These beds are designed to offer comfort and accessibility, as therapists often work from the floor. With a low height design, these beds make it easy for therapists to perform traditional Thai massages, which often involve stretching and other unique techniques.

Ayurvedic Massage Table

The ancient practice of Ayurveda has become increasingly popular in wellness resorts worldwide. Esthetica’s Ayurvedic massage tables are specifically designed for this holistic healing treatment. The tables are crafted to support the principles of Ayurvedic therapies, with special attention given to the ergonomic design and comfort of both the client and therapist. These tables can be customized to accommodate specific Ayurvedic techniques such as Shirodhara (oil pouring) and Abhyanga (oil massage).

Customization Options for Spa Furniture

Esthetica understands that every wellness resort has its unique style and preferences. To cater to these individual needs, Esthetica offers extensive customization options. Whether it's adjusting the size, wood finish, or upholstery color, Esthetica ensures that spa furniture fits seamlessly into your spa's design. Customization allows resorts to personalize their spa setups and create an environment that reflects their brand and ambiance.

Why Choose Esthetica?

Esthetica’s spa furniture is built with durability, comfort, and style in mind. As the wellness industry continues to grow, investing in high-quality spa equipment is essential for ensuring a superior guest experience. Esthetica’s extensive product range, combined with their commitment to customization and quality, makes them a preferred choice for luxury hotel and resort spas worldwide.

By offering an array of specialty massage tables, Ayurvedic tables, relaxation loungers, and other essential spa furniture, Esthetica is helping wellness resorts create the perfect spa experience for their guests. The company’s attention to detail and commitment to innovation set it apart in a competitive industry, ensuring that every client is treated to an experience that’s nothing short of exceptional.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

item.title: Massage Beds
item.dc:creator: estheticaspafurniture
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content" el_class="product-pages"][vc_column][vc_raw_html css="" el_class="custom-filter"][/vc_raw_html][ess_grid alias="grid-2"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css="" el_class="section-div-p"]

Welcome to Esthetica: Your Premier Destination for Massage Beds

At Esthetica, we specialize in the art of crafting high-quality massage beds designed to enhance the comfort and functionality of any spa, salon, wellness centre, or private practice. Our extensive range includes everything from premium electric spa massage tables to wooden massage beds with storage, ensuring we have the perfect solution for every therapist's needs.

Our Diverse Range of Massage Beds

Premium Electric Spa Massage Tables Our electric spa massage tables are engineered for versatility and ease of use. With adjustable heights and settings, these tables provide therapists with the ability to cater to each client's unique preferences. The smooth electric operation allows for seamless transitions between treatments, enhancing the overall experience for both the therapist and the client. Wooden Massage Beds with Storage For those looking for a touch of elegance combined with practicality, our wooden massage beds with storage are ideal. Crafted from high-quality materials, these beds not only provide a stable and luxurious surface for treatments but also offer integrated storage solutions, ensuring your workspace remains organized and clutter-free. Low-Height Thai Massage Beds Our low-height Thai massage beds are specifically designed to accommodate traditional Thai massage techniques. These beds allow for easy access and mobility, promoting a more effective and authentic massage experience. Ayurvedic Massage Beds Embrace the healing traditions of Ayurveda with our specialized Ayurvedic massage beds. These beds are thoughtfully designed to support various Ayurvedic treatments, offering both comfort and functionality for holistic practitioners. Portable Massage Tables For therapists on the go, our portable massage tables offer convenience without compromising on quality. Lightweight yet sturdy, these tables can be easily transported, making them perfect for home visits, outdoor events, or temporary setups. Massage Tables for Reiki Our massage tables for Reiki are tailored to provide a serene and supportive environment for energy healing practices. These tables feature comfortable padding and adjustable settings to enhance the Reiki experience. Prenatal Massage Tables We understand the importance of comfort during pregnancy. Our prenatal massage tables are designed with special features to support expectant mothers, providing them with a safe and comfortable space for relaxation and therapeutic care.

Customization Options

At Esthetica, we believe that each therapist has unique needs. That’s why we offer extensive customization options. You can choose the size, wood stain colour, and upholstery colour of your massage bed to create a piece that perfectly aligns with your aesthetic and functional requirements. High-Quality Materials and Craftsmanship All our massage beds are manufactured using real wood or real wood veneers, ensuring durability and a premium look. Our skilled craftsmen employ proper carpentry techniques, including tenon and mortise joinery, to guarantee the strength and stability required in any professional setting. We take pride in our meticulous attention to detail and precision, ensuring that each piece is built to last.

Comfort Features

Premium Cushioning Comfort is paramount in any massage setting. Our beds are equipped with premium cushioning, combining high-resilience foam with latex and memory foam for an optimal experience. This unique blend not only provides support but also adapts to the contours of the body, ensuring maximum comfort for clients during treatments. Adjustable Armrests Our massage beds come with lower-able armrests that provide added convenience and comfort. These armrests can be adjusted according to the treatment being provided, ensuring that clients are fully supported throughout their sessions. In-Built Heating Function Enhance your clients’ relaxation with our built-in heating function. This feature provides gentle warmth that helps to soothe muscles and promote a deeper level of relaxation, creating an unforgettable experience.

Eco-Friendly Options

At Esthetica, we are committed to sustainability. We offer a variety of eco-friendly options, including:
  • Eco-Friendly Recycled Leather: Our premium upholstery options include eco-friendly recycled leather, helping to protect the environment while maintaining the luxurious feel of your massage bed.
  • Water-Based Coatings: Choose from our eco-friendly water-based coatings or opt for standard solvent-based polyurethane coatings to finish your massage bed. Both options are designed to enhance durability while being conscious of environmental impact.

Collaborate with Us

Let us help you find the perfect massage bed tailored to your specific needs. We invite you to collaborate with us; and share your requirements, and our expert team will provide personalized recommendations to suggest the most suitable table for your practice. Whether you are setting up a new spa or upgrading your existing equipment, Esthetica is here to support you every step of the way.

Why Choose Esthetica?

  • Quality Assurance: We prioritize quality in every aspect of our manufacturing process, ensuring you receive a product that meets the highest standards.
  • Expertise: With years of experience in crafting massage beds, our knowledgeable team understands the nuances of what makes a table exceptional.
  • Customer Satisfaction: Our commitment to customer satisfaction means we are always ready to listen and adapt to your needs.

Esthetica’s Global Presence

Esthetica Spa & Salon Resources Pvt Ltd has established a formidable global presence as a leading manufacturer and exporter of premium quality massage tables. Our products are highly sought after, with international distribution spanning countries such as the UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Oman, Bahrain, Belgium, the United Kingdom, Australia, South Africa, Poland, and the USA, among others in Asia and Europe. Committed to excellence, we ensure our high-quality offerings reach clients worldwide, facilitated by preferential trade agreements that allow for duty-free exports to Australia, the UAE, and ASEAN countries. This strategic approach not only enhances our competitiveness but also solidifies our reputation as a trusted partner in the wellness industry on a global scale

Conclusion

Transform your massage practice with our premium range of massage beds at Esthetica. From electric spa tables to portable options, each bed is crafted with precision and care, ensuring the best experience for therapists and clients. With extensive customization options and a commitment to eco-friendly practices, Esthetica is your trusted partner in wellness. Contact us today to discuss your requirements, and let’s create the perfect massage bed for you![/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_raw_js][/vc_raw_js][/vc_column][/vc_row]

item.title: Salon Furniture
item.dc:creator: estheticaspafurniture
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content" el_class="product-pages"][vc_column][vc_raw_html css="" el_class="custom-filter"][/vc_raw_html][ess_grid alias="grid-3"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css="" el_class="section-div-p"]

Discover Premium Salon Furniture at Esthetica

Welcome to Esthetica, where we elevate your spa and salon experience with our exceptional range of premium salon furniture. We recognize that every hotel spa, home spa, or resort spa features a dedicated area for salon services, and the quality of your furniture can make all the difference. That’s why we offer a curated selection of high-quality salon chairs, styling chairs, barber chairs, and make-up chairs designed to blend comfort, functionality, and aesthetic appeal.

Tailored Solutions for Every Space

Our salon furniture collection is crafted to meet the diverse needs of the salon industry. Whether you’re operating a bustling hotel spa or a serene home salon, we have the perfect solutions for your space. Our offerings include:

  • Salon Chairs: Designed with ergonomics in mind, our salon chairs provide the comfort and support your clients deserve, ensuring a delightful experience from the moment they sit down.
  • Styling Chairs: Our styling chairs combine elegance and practicality, making them ideal for all hair types and styling needs. With adjustable features, they cater to the comfort of both stylists and clients.
  • Barber Chairs: Built to provide durability and comfort, our barber chairs are designed for traditional barbering as well as modern styling techniques, ensuring versatility in your services.
  • Make-Up Chairs: Enhance your make-up application services with our specialized chairs that offer support and style, creating an inviting space for your clients.

Innovative Hair Wash and Shampoo Stations

One of our standout offerings is our high-end hair wash stations and shampoo stations, which are designed to provide an indulgent experience for your clients. These stations come equipped with:

  • In-built Massage Functions: Add a touch of luxury with massage features that promote relaxation and elevate the shampoo experience.
  • Electric Leg Raise Function: Enhance comfort for your clients with adjustable leg support, making every visit a pampering session.

Customization for a Cohesive Look

At Esthetica, we understand the importance of aesthetics in creating a harmonious atmosphere. That’s why we offer customization options for upholstery to match the décor of your spa furniture, ensuring a seamless and unified look throughout your space.

Branding Opportunities

To further enhance your branding, we provide the option to emboss your logo on the upholstery of your salon furniture. This not only adds a personal touch but also reinforces your brand identity, creating a lasting impression on your clients.

Comprehensive Salon Equipment

In addition to our luxurious salon furniture, Esthetica is proud to offer a wide range of salon equipment to complete your setup:

  • Barber Trolleys: Keep your workspace organized with our functional and stylish barber trolleys, designed for easy access to tools.
  • Facial Trolleys: Our facial trolleys are perfect for aestheticians, equipped to hold all your essential products and tools for a streamlined workflow.
  • Hair Trolleys: Ensure efficiency during hair services with our versatile hair trolleys, designed to keep your tools within reach.
  • Hair Dryers & Irons: Our high-quality hair dryers and styling irons ensure that your clients leave looking their best.
  • Facial Steamers: Enhance your facial treatments with our professional-grade facial steamers, designed for effective and relaxing sessions.
  • UV Instrument Sterilizers: Maintain the highest hygiene standards in your salon with our UV sterilizers, essential for client safety.

Elevate Your Salon Experience

At Esthetica, we are dedicated to providing you with the best in salon furniture and equipment. Our commitment to quality, customization, and customer satisfaction sets us apart as your go-to source for all your salon needs. Explore our range today and transform your salon into a haven of comfort and style, ensuring your clients always leave feeling rejuvenated and pampered.

Esthetica’s Global Presence

Esthetica Spa & Salon Resources Pvt Ltd has established a formidable global presence as a leading manufacturer and exporter of premium quality salon chairs and hair wash units. Our products are highly sought after, with international distribution spanning countries such as the UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Oman, Bahrain, Belgium, the United Kingdom, Australia, South Africa, Poland, and the USA, among others in Asia and Europe. Committed to excellence, we ensure our high-quality offerings reach clients worldwide, facilitated by preferential trade agreements that allow for duty-free exports to Australia, the UAE, and ASEAN countries. This strategic approach not only enhances our competitiveness but also solidifies our reputation as a trusted partner in the wellness industry on a global scale.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_raw_js][/vc_raw_js][/vc_column][/vc_row]

item.title: Spa Relaxation Loungers
item.dc:creator: estheticaspafurniture
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content" el_class="product-pages"][vc_column][vc_raw_html css="" el_class="custom-filter"][/vc_raw_html][ess_grid alias="grid-4"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css="" el_class="section-div-p"]

Welcome to Esthetica:

Your Destination for Premium Relaxation Beds

At Esthetica, we believe that relaxation should be a luxurious experience, whether indoors or outdoors. Our exquisite range of relaxation beds is designed to elevate any space, combining functionality, comfort, and style. Crafted from the finest materials and designed with meticulous attention to detail, our beds are perfect for both residential and commercial settings, including hotels and resorts.

Outdoor Poolside Loungers

Transform your outdoor space with our premium quality relaxation beds, specifically designed for poolside areas. Our loungers are expertly crafted from solid teak wood using traditional tenon and mortise joinery, ensuring exceptional durability and stability. Each piece is finished with marine-grade wood adhesives and treated with Italian outdoor wood coatings, making them resilient against the harshest weather conditions.

Superior Outdoor Upholstery

Our commitment to quality extends beyond the wood. We utilize premium outdoor upholstery featuring a Nano high-tech compound that enhances longevity and ease of maintenance. This fabric is:

  • UV Resistant: Protects against sun damage and fading.
  • Oil Resistant: Easy to clean and maintain.
  • Weather Resistant: Stands up to rain and humidity.
  • Disinfectant Resistant: Suitable for high-traffic areas and ensures hygiene.
  • Salt Water and Chlorine Resistant: Perfect for poolside environments.

With these features, our loungers are not only comfortable but also practical for any outdoor setting.

Indoor Spa Loungers

In addition to our outdoor offerings, Esthetica provides a stunning collection of indoor spa loungers, available in both electric and non-electric models. Our indoor loungers are designed to provide optimal comfort, making them ideal for spa settings, wellness centres, or relaxation areas in hotels.

Electric Spa Relaxation Loungers

Our powered spa loungers take relaxation to the next level with advanced features designed for ultimate convenience:

  • Electronic Backrest and Leg Rest Adjustments: Customize your position for maximum comfort.
  • Detachable Reading Lamp: Enjoy your favourite book or magazine while you relax.
  • USB Charging Socket: Stay connected even while you unwind.
  • In-built Heating Function: Add an extra layer of comfort with adjustable warmth.
  • Foldable Lateral Shelf Support: Convenient for personal items or refreshments.

These electric loungers are perfect for creating a luxurious spa experience, ensuring your clients can fully unwind and indulge in relaxation.

Non-Electric Spa Relaxation Beds

For those who prefer a more traditional approach, our non-electric relaxation beds are ergonomically designed for maximum comfort. These versatile beds can be used indoors or in wet areas, offering a seamless blend of functionality and style. The ergonomic design, combined with comfortable upholstery and foam cushioning, ensures that every client enjoys a restorative experience.

Customization for Your Unique Space

At Esthetica, we understand that every space is unique. As a factory producing these spa loungers, we offer customization options to meet your specific needs. You can personalize the following aspects:

  • Size: Tailor the dimensions to fit your space perfectly.
  • Wood Finish: Choose from a variety of finishes to match your decor.
  • Upholstery Colour: Select the ideal colour to complement your design scheme.

With our custom options, you can create relaxation beds that are not only functional but also enhance the aesthetic of your spa or resort.

Why Choose Esthetica?

When you choose Esthetica, you are choosing quality, craftsmanship, and innovation. Our dedication to using the finest materials and advanced technology sets us apart from the competition. We strive to ensure that every relaxation bed we produce meets the highest standards, allowing you to offer an unparalleled experience to your clients.

Exceptional Customer Support

Our commitment to customer satisfaction doesn’t end with your purchase. We provide exceptional customer support to assist you in selecting the right products and addressing any questions or concerns you may have. Our knowledgeable team is always here to help you create the perfect relaxation environment.

Elevate Your Space Today

Enhance your indoor and outdoor relaxation areas with Esthetica's premium relaxation beds. Explore our collection and discover the perfect loungers to complement your spa or resort. Contact us today to learn more about our products and customization options, and let us help you create a haven of relaxation for your clients. Choose Esthetica for an unmatched blend of luxury and functionality!

Esthetica’s Global Presence

Esthetica Spa & Salon Resources Pvt Ltd has installed its spa relaxation loungers in many premium spa resorts and hotels, spas across the globe. The Bodhi Spa in the USA and Wai Araki in New Zealand are using Mandakani Spa Relaxation Loungers.  Our products are highly sought after, with international distribution spanning countries such as the UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Oman, Bahrain, Belgium, the United Kingdom, Australia, South Africa, Poland, and the USA, among others in Asia and Europe. Committed to excellence, we ensure our high-quality offerings reach clients worldwide, facilitated by preferential trade agreements that allow for duty-free exports to Australia, the UAE, and ASEAN countries. This strategic approach not only enhances our competitiveness but also solidifies our reputation as a trusted partner in the wellness industry on a global scale.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_raw_js][/vc_raw_js][/vc_column][/vc_row]

item.title: Spa Accessories
item.dc:creator: estheticaspafurniture
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content" el_class="product-pages"][vc_column][vc_raw_html css="" el_class="custom-filter"][/vc_raw_html][ess_grid alias="grid-5"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css="" el_class="section-div-p"]
Welcome to Esthetica:

Your Premier Source for Spa Equipment and Accessories

At Esthetica, we understand that sourcing the right equipment and accessories for your spa or salon can often feel like a daunting task. Coordinating with multiple suppliers for essential yet often overlooked items can drain your time and energy. That’s why we’re here—to simplify your job and help you focus on what you do best: providing exceptional services to your clients.

Curated Collections for Every Need

We pride ourselves on offering a carefully curated collection of spa equipment and accessories, designed specifically for professionals in the beauty and wellness industry. Our extensive range of products ensures that you have everything you need to create an inviting and effective environment for your clients. From the essentials to the unique touches that enhance the spa experience, Esthetica has you covered.

Our Offerings Include:

  • Massage Table Warmers: Enhance client comfort with our reliable and efficient massage table warmers. Perfect for those chilly days, they ensure a soothing and relaxing experience.
  • Massage Oil Warmers: Set the mood for relaxation with our massage oil warmers, designed to heat oils to the perfect temperature for treatments.
  • Massage Stone Heaters & Stones: Deliver the ultimate in relaxation with our quality massage stones and heaters, allowing for a rejuvenating hot stone massage.
  • Copper Pedicure Bowls: Bring a touch of elegance to your spa with our beautiful copper pedicure bowls, ideal for enhancing your pedicure services.
  • Foot Soak Bowls & Manicure Bowls: Our selection of foot soak and manicure bowls are designed for comfort and durability, making them a staple in any salon.
  • Service Trays & Oil Tester Trays: Keep your workspace organized and efficient with our stylish service trays, ensuring a seamless experience for both you and your clients.
  • Do Not Disturb Door Signs: Maintain a serene atmosphere in your massage room with our discreet and professional door signs.
  • Singing Bowls & Tingsha Bells: Incorporate sound therapy into your practice with our beautifully crafted singing bowls and tingsha bells, enhancing the relaxation experience.
  • Aroma Oil Burners: Create a soothing ambiance with our aroma oil burners, perfect for diffusing calming scents throughout your spa.
  • Hot Towel Cabinets & Towel Warmers: Provide a luxurious touch to your services with our hot towel cabinets and warmers, ensuring your towels are always at the perfect temperature.
  • UV Sterilizers: Maintain the highest standards of hygiene with our UV sterilizers, essential for ensuring your tools and accessories are safe for every client.

Simplifying Your Experience

At Esthetica, we believe that sourcing high-quality spa equipment should be straightforward and stress-free. By centralizing your shopping experience, we save you valuable time, allowing you to focus on providing exceptional care to your clients. Our commitment to quality means you can trust that every product you purchase meets the highest industry standards.

Why Choose Esthetica?

  • Curated Quality: Each product is handpicked to ensure it meets the needs of modern spas and salons.
  • Expert Support: Our knowledgeable team is always ready to assist you in finding the perfect products for your specific needs.
  • Convenience: Enjoy the ease of sourcing all your spa essentials from one trusted provider.
Elevate your spa or salon experience today with Esthetica. Explore our curated collection and discover how we can simplify your sourcing process, allowing you to create a truly relaxing environment for your clients. Your journey to a better spa experience starts here!

Esthetica’s Global Presence

Esthetica Spa & Salon Resources Pvt Ltd has established a formidable global presence as a leading manufacturer and exporter of premium quality brass and copper pedicure bowls and accessories. Our products are highly sought after, with international distribution spanning countries such as the UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Oman, Bahrain, Belgium, the United Kingdom, Australia, South Africa, Poland, and the USA, among others in Asia and Europe. Committed to excellence, we ensure our high-quality offerings reach clients worldwide, facilitated by preferential trade agreements that allow for duty-free exports to Australia, the UAE, and ASEAN countries. This strategic approach not only enhances our competitiveness but also solidifies our reputation as a trusted partner in the wellness industry on a global scale. [/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_raw_js][/vc_raw_js][/vc_column][/vc_row]

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.dc:creator: estheticaspafurniture
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content" gap="2"][vc_column css=".vc_custom_1744115870519{margin-left: 45px !important;border-left-width: 20px !important;padding-left: 15px !important;border-radius: 1px !important;}"][vc_column_text]

Privacy Policy

Last updated: 08 April 2025

This Privacy Policy describes Our policies and procedures on the collection, use and disclosure of Your information when You use the Service and tells You about Your privacy rights and how the law protects You.

We use Your Personal data to provide and improve the Service. By using the Service, You agree to the collection and use of information in accordance with this Privacy Policy.

Interpretation and Definitions

Interpretation

The words of which the initial letter is capitalized have meanings defined under the following conditions. The following definitions shall have the same meaning regardless of whether they appear in the singular or in the plural.

Definitions

For the purposes of this Privacy Policy:

  • Account means a unique account created for You to access our Service or parts of our Service.
  • Company (referred to as either 'the Company', 'We', 'Us' or 'Our' in this Agreement) refers to Esthetica Spa and Salon Resources Pvt. Ltd., Plot No. 249, Sector 6, IMT Manesar.
  • Cookies are small files that are placed on Your computer, mobile device or any other device by a website, containing the details of Your browsing history on that website among its many uses.
  • Country refers to: Haryana, India
  • Device means any device that can access the Service such as a computer, a cell phone or a digital tablet.
  • Personal Data is any information that relates to an identified or identifiable individual.
  • Service refers to the Website.
  • Service Provider means any natural or legal person who processes the data on behalf of the Company. It refers to third-party companies or individuals employed by the Company to facilitate the Service, to provide the Service on behalf of the Company, to perform services related to the Service or to assist the Company in analyzing how the Service is used.
  • Third-party Social Media Service refers to any website or any social network website through which a User can log in or create an account to use the Service.
  • Usage Data refers to data collected automatically, either generated by the use of the Service or from the Service infrastructure itself (for example, the duration of a page visit).
  • Website refers to Esthetica Spa and Salon Resources Pvt. Ltd., accessible from https://www.spafurniture.in/
  • You mean the individual accessing or using the Service, or the company, or other legal entity on behalf of which such individual is accessing or using the Service, as applicable.

Collecting and Using Your Personal Data

Types of Data Collected

Personal Data

While using Our Service, We may ask You to provide Us with certain personally identifiable information that can be used to contact or identify You. Personally identifiable information may include, but is not limited to:

  • Email address
  • First name and last name
  • Phone number
  • Address, State, Province, ZIP/Postal code, City
  • Usage Data

Usage Data

Usage Data is collected automatically when using the Service.

Usage Data may include information such as Your Device's Internet Protocol address (e.g. IP address), browser type, browser version, the pages of our Service that You visit, the time and date of Your visit, the time spent on those pages, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.

When You access the Service by or through a mobile device, We may collect certain information automatically, including, but not limited to, the type of mobile device You use, Your mobile device unique ID, the IP address of Your mobile device, Your mobile operating system, the type of mobile Internet browser You use, unique device identifiers and other diagnostic data.

We may also collect information that Your browser sends whenever You visit our Service or when You access the Service by or through a mobile device.

Tracking Technologies and Cookies

We use Cookies and similar tracking technologies to track the activity on Our Service and store certain information. Tracking technologies used are beacons, tags, and scripts to collect and track information and to improve and analyze Our Service. The technologies We use may include:

  • Cookies or Browser Cookies. A cookie is a small file placed on Your Device. You can instruct Your browser to refuse all Cookies or to indicate when a Cookie is being sent. However, if You do not accept Cookies, You may not be able to use some parts of our Service. Unless you have adjusted Your browser setting so that it will refuse Cookies, our Service may use Cookies.
  • Flash Cookies. Certain features of our Service may use local stored objects (or Flash Cookies) to collect and store information about Your preferences or Your activity on our Service. Flash Cookies are not managed by the same browser settings as those used for Browser Cookies. For more information on how You can delete Flash Cookies, please read 'Where can I change the settings for disabling, or deleting local shared objects?' available at
  • Web Beacons. Certain sections of our Service and our emails may contain small electronic files known as web beacons (also referred to as clear gifs, pixel tags, and single-pixel gifs) that permit the Company, for example, to count users who have visited those pages or opened an email and for other related website statistics (for example, recording the popularity of a certain section and verifying system and server integrity).

Cookies can be 'Persistent' or 'Session' Cookies. Persistent Cookies remain on Your personal computer or mobile device when You go offline, while Session Cookies are deleted as soon as You close Your web browser.

We use both Session and Persistent Cookies for the purposes set out below:

  • Necessary / Essential Cookies
    Type: Session Cookies
    Administered by: Us
    Purpose: These Cookies are essential to provide You with services available through the Website and to enable You to use some of its features. They help to authenticate users and prevent fraudulent use of user accounts. Without these Cookies, the services that You have asked for cannot be provided, and We only use these Cookies to provide You with those services.
  • Cookies Policy / Notice Acceptance Cookies
    Type: Persistent Cookies
    Administered by: Us
    Purpose: These Cookies identify if users have accepted the use of cookies on the Website.
  • Functionality Cookies
    Type: Persistent Cookies
    Administered by: Us
    Purpose: These Cookies allow us to remember choices You make when You use the Website, such as remembering your login details or language preference. The purpose of these Cookies is to provide You with a more personal experience and to avoid You having to re-enter your preferences every time You use the Website.

For more information about the cookies we use and your choices regarding cookies, please visit our Cookies Policy or the Cookies section of our Privacy Policy.

Use of Your Personal Data

The Company may use Personal Data for the following purposes:

  • To provide and maintain our Service, including to monitor the usage of our Service.
  • To manage Your Account: to manage Your registration as a user of the Service. The Personal Data You provide can give You access to different functionalities of the Service that are available to You as a registered user.
  • For the performance of a contract: the development, compliance and undertaking of the purchase contract for the products, items or services You have purchased or of any other contract with Us through the Service.
  • To contact You: To contact You by email, telephone calls, SMS, or other equivalent forms of electronic communication, such as a mobile application's push notifications regarding updates or informative communications related to the functionalities, products or contracted services, including the security updates, when necessary or reasonable for their implementation.
  • To provide You with news, special offers and general information about other goods, services and events which we offer that are similar to those that you have already purchased or enquired about unless You have opted not to receive such information.
  • To manage Your requests: To attend and manage Your requests to Us.
  • For business transfers: We may use Your information to evaluate or conduct a merger, divestiture, restructuring, reorganization, dissolution, or other sale or transfer of some or all of Our assets, whether as a going concern or as part of bankruptcy, liquidation, or similar proceeding, in which Personal Data held by Us about our Service users is among the assets transferred.
  • For other purposes: We may use Your information for other purposes, such as data analysis, identifying usage trends, determining the effectiveness of our promotional campaigns and to evaluate and improve our Service, products, services, marketing and your experience.

We may share Your personal information in the following situations:

  • With Service Providers: We may share Your personal information with Service Providers to monitor and analyze the use of our Service, to contact You.
  • For business transfers: We may share or transfer Your personal information in connection with, or during negotiations of, any merger, sale of Company assets, financing, or acquisition of all or a portion of Our business to another company.
  • With Affiliates: We may share Your information with Our affiliates, in which case we will require those affiliates to honor this Privacy Policy. Affiliates include Our parent company and any other subsidiaries, joint venture partners or other companies that We control or that are under common control with Us.
  • With business partners: We may share Your information with Our business partners to offer You certain products, services or promotions.
  • With other users: when You share personal information or otherwise interact in the public areas with other users, such information may be viewed by all users and may be publicly distributed outside. If You interact with other users or register through a Third-Party Social Media Service, Your contacts on the Third-Party Social Media Service may see Your name, profile, pictures and description of Your activity. Similarly, other users will be able to view descriptions of Your activity, communicate with You and view Your profile.
  • With Your consent: We may disclose Your personal information for any other purpose with Your consent.

Retention of Your Personal Data

The Company will retain Your Personal Data only for as long as is necessary for the purposes set out in this Privacy Policy. We will retain and use Your Personal Data to the extent necessary to comply with our legal obligations (for example, if we are required to retain your data to comply with applicable laws), resolve disputes, and enforce our legal agreements and policies.

The Company will also retain Usage Data for internal analysis purposes. Usage Data is generally retained for a shorter period of time, except when this data is used to strengthen the security or to improve the functionality of Our Service, or We are legally obligated to retain this data for longer time periods.

Transfer of Your Personal Data

Your information, including Personal Data, is processed at the Company's operating offices and in any other places where the parties involved in the processing are located. It means that this information may be transferred to — and maintained on — computers located outside of Your state, province, country or other governmental jurisdiction where the data protection laws may differ from those from Your jurisdiction.

Your consent to this Privacy Policy followed by Your submission of such information represents Your agreement to that transfer.

The Company will take all steps reasonably necessary to ensure that Your data is treated securely and in accordance with this Privacy Policy and no transfer of Your Personal Data will take place to an organization or a country unless there are adequate controls in place including the security of Your data and other personal information.

Disclosure of Your Personal Data

Business Transactions

If the Company is involved in a merger, acquisition or asset sale, Your Personal Data may be transferred. We will provide notice before Your Personal Data is transferred and becomes subject to a different Privacy Policy.

Law enforcement

Under certain circumstances, the Company may be required to disclose Your Personal Data if required to do so by law or in response to valid requests by public authorities (e.g. a court or a government agency).

Other legal requirements

The Company may disclose Your Personal Data in the good faith belief that such action is necessary to:

  • Comply with a legal obligation
  • Protect and defend the rights or property of the Company
  • Prevent or investigate possible wrongdoing in connection with the Service
  • Protect the personal safety of Users of the Service or the public
  • Protect against legal liability

Security of Your Personal Data

The security of Your Personal Data is important to Us, but remember that no method of transmission over the Internet, or method of electronic storage is 100% secure. While We strive to use commercially acceptable means to protect Your Personal Data, We cannot guarantee its absolute security.

Children's Privacy

Our Service does not address anyone under the age of 13. We do not knowingly collect personally identifiable information from anyone under the age of 13. If You are a parent or guardian and You are aware that Your child has provided Us with Personal Data, please contact Us. If We become aware that We have collected Personal Data from anyone under the age of 13 without verification of parental consent, We take steps to remove that information from Our servers.

If We need to rely on consent as a legal basis for processing Your information and Your country requires consent from a parent, We may require Your parent's consent before We collect and use that information.

Links to Other Websites

Our Service may contain links to other websites that are not operated by Us. If You click on a third party link, You will be directed to that third party's site. We strongly advise You to review the Privacy Policy of every site You visit.

We have no control over and assume no responsibility for the content, privacy policies or practices of any third party sites or services.

Changes to this Privacy Policy

We may update Our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify You of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page.

We will let You know via email and/or a prominent notice on Our Service, prior to the change becoming effective and update the 'Last updated' date at the top of this Privacy Policy.

You are advised to review this Privacy Policy periodically for any changes. Changes to this Privacy Policy are effective when they are posted on this page.

Contact Us

If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, You can contact us:

By email: info@spafurniture.in[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row]

item.title: Spa Trolleys
item.dc:creator: estheticaspafurniture
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content" el_class="product-pages"][vc_column][vc_raw_html css="" el_class="custom-filter"][/vc_raw_html][ess_grid alias="grid-6"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css="" el_class="section-div-p"]

Elevate Your Spa Experience with Esthetica's Spa Trolleys

At Esthetica, we understand that spa trolleys are an integral part of any spa room setup. These versatile spa carts allow you to effortlessly move essential supplies around during treatments, keeping your spa oils, creams, and towels within easy reach for a seamless massage experience. Our diverse range of spa trolleys is designed to meet various needs, ensuring that you find the perfect solution for your treatment space. Choose from low-height pedicure trolleys, barber trolleys, and specialized equipment trolleys, as well as carts specifically designed for hot towel cabinets, laser machines, and massage stone heaters. Crafted from high-quality materials, our spa trolleys are mostly made in solid wood, however, some designs use mild steel and elegant glass shelves. Most of these spa treatment room trolleys are equipped with three-tier storage but you will also find designs in our portfolio with drawer cabinets, providing ample storage for all your spa essentials. Customization is at the heart of our offerings. We invite you to personalize your spa trolley to match your spa treatment bed or spa room’s aesthetics. Select your desired size and finishes to create a cohesive and inviting atmosphere that reflects your brand. With Esthetica's spa trolleys, you can enhance the efficiency and organization of your spa treatments while elevating the overall experience for your clients. Explore our collection today and discover how our expertly de

Esthetica’s Global Presence

Esthetica Spa & Salon Resources Pvt Ltd has established a formidable global presence as a leading manufacturer and exporter of premium quality spa treatment room trolleys. Our spa carts are highly sought after, with international distribution spanning countries such as the UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Oman, Bahrain, Belgium, the United Kingdom, Australia, South Africa, Poland, and the USA, among others in Asia and Europe. Committed to excellence, we ensure our high-quality offerings reach clients worldwide, facilitated by preferential trade agreements that allow for duty-free exports to Australia, the UAE, and ASEAN countries. This strategic approach not only enhances our competitiveness but also solidifies our reputation as a trusted partner in the wellness industry on a global scale[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_raw_js][/vc_raw_js][/vc_column][/vc_row]

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Buy Premium Spa Trolleys & Carts Online – Esthetica
Buy premium spa trolleys for organized and efficient service. Spa cart options with wheels and storage. Perfect for salons, spas, and wellness centers. Visit now!

item.title: Spa Stools
item.dc:creator: estheticaspafurniture
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content" el_class="product-pages"][vc_column][vc_raw_html css="" el_class="custom-filter"][/vc_raw_html][ess_grid alias="grid-7"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css="" el_class="section-div-p"]

Discover Our Exquisite Range of Spa Stools

At Esthetica, we offer a carefully curated selection of spa stools that blend functionality and style to enhance your treatment spaces. Our product range includes a variety of handcrafted solid wood spa stools, perfect for indoor use in treatment rooms. These durable and elegant stools add a touch of sophistication to any spa environment. For therapists on the go, our easy-to-carry folding therapist stools provide a practical solution without compromising comfort. Additionally, our low-height pedicurist chairs and stools are specifically designed for manicure and pedicure areas, ensuring that your clients enjoy a comfortable experience while you work. Our designer spa therapist chairs feature stylish wooden backrests, combining aesthetics with ergonomic support. For medical and beauty treatment rooms, we offer stools crafted with aluminum alloy bases and stainless steel components, ensuring durability and ease of maintenance. Most of our wooden stools are fixed-height, providing stability, while our other designs come equipped with gas lifts for height adjustment and castor wheels for effortless mobility around the treatment room. This versatility allows you to tailor your workspace to meet the needs of each client and service. Customization is key at Esthetica. The upholstery of our attendant chairs can be personalized to match your massage or treatment table upholstery, creating a cohesive and visually appealing environment that enhances the overall experience for your clients. Transform your spa or treatment room with our premium spa stools, designed for comfort, functionality, and style. Explore our collection today and discover the perfect seating solutions to elevate your service offerings!

Esthetica’s Global Presence

Esthetica Spa & Salon Resources Pvt Ltd has established a formidable global presence as a leading manufacturer and exporter of premium quality spa stools and therapist chairs. Our spa carts are highly sought after, with international distribution spanning countries such as the UAE, Qatar, Saudi Arabia, Oman, Maldives, Hong Kong, Bahrain, Belgium, the United Kingdom, Australia, South Africa, Poland, and the USA, among others in Asia and Europe. Committed to excellence, we ensure our high-quality offerings reach clients worldwide, facilitated by preferential trade agreements that allow for duty-free exports to Australia, the UAE, and ASEAN countries. This strategic approach not only enhances our competitiveness but also solidifies our reputation as a trusted partner in the wellness industry on a global scale.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_raw_js][/vc_raw_js][/vc_column][/vc_row]

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Spa Stools & Therapist Chairs | Premium Pedicurist Stools
Buy durable spa stools for salons and wellness spaces. Stylish pedicurist stool options available. Therapist chair with adjustable height and comfort. Visit Now!
