[vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content" full_height="yes" equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row="" el_class="proRotate home-page-graphic-for-nov"][vc_column el_class="vertMid"][vc_column_text css_animation="none"]
[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="bottom-to-top" el_class="proText"]
Featured Here The Shirodhara Massage Bed
[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row" parallax="content-moving" parallax_image="1439" overlay_row="" el_class="callAction1"][vc_column el_class="callBtn"][vc_column_text css="" el_id="div-1"]

الشركة الرائدة في تصنيع أثاث السبا الفاخر في المملكة العربية السعودية

تُعتبر إستيتكا شركة رائدة في تصنيع وتوريد أثاث السبا عالي الجودة في المملكة العربية السعودية. مع التزام قوي بالجودة والتصميم العصري، نقدم مجموعة متنوعة من المنتجات، بما في ذلك طاولات التدليك الفاخرة، وأسرّة التدليك الكهربائية، ومحطات البيديكير، وكراسي الاسترخاء في السبا، ومجموعة رائعة من أثاث صالونات التجميل. تتميز منتجاتنا بتقنيات متطورة، وميزات قابلة للتعديل، وتصاميم مريحة لضمان أقصى درجات الراحة والوظيفية. موزعنا المعتمد، ماضي انترناشيونال، يعمل في الرياض وجدة والخبر. تلتزم ماضي انترناشيونال بتوزيع وتعزيز عروضنا من أثاث السبا والصالونات عبر هذه المدن، مما يضمن أن تكون المنتجعات والصالونات الفاخرة قادرة على الوصول إلى منتجاتنا العالية الجودة. الرياض، المملكة العربية السعودية دار ماضي انترناشيونال و.ل.ل. السليمانية، شارع الذهّاب تقاطع شارع الملك عبد العزيز الرياض – المملكة العربية السعودية ص.ب: 25862، الرمز البريدي 11476 جدة، المملكة العربية السعودية دار ماضي انترناشيونال و.ل.ل. مكتب رقم 501B، الطابق الخامس، المبنى B شارع الأمير محمد بن عبد العزيز - مركز بن عمران جدة – المملكة العربية السعودية ص.ب: 25862، الرمز البريدي 11476 الخبر دار ماضي انترناشيونال و.ل.ل. الطابق السادس، البرجين التوأميين البندريه، طريق الملك سلمان الخبر – المملكة العربية السعودية ص.ب: 25862، الرمز البريدي 11476 للاستفسارات ولمزيد من المعلومات حول منتجاتنا، يُرجى التواصل معنا على madi.international@spafurniture.in[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css="" el_id="div-2"]

Leading Manufacturer of Premium Spa Furniture in Saudi Arabia

Esthetica is a premier manufacturer and supplier of high-quality spa furniture in Saudi Arabia. With a strong commitment to quality and modern design, we offer a diverse range of products, including premium massage tables, electric massage beds, pedicure stations, spa relaxation loungers, and an exquisite collection of salon furniture. Our products are equipped with sophisticated technologies, adjustable features, and ergonomic designs to ensure optimal comfort and functionality. Our authorized distributor, Madi International, operates in Riyadh, Jeddah, and Al Khobar. Madi International is dedicated to distributing and promoting our spa and salon furniture offerings across these cities, ensuring that luxury spas and salons have access to our premium-quality products.[/vc_column_text][vc_raw_html css="" el_id="div-3"][/vc_raw_html][vc_column_text css="" el_id="div-4"]For inquiries and further information about our products, please reach out to us at madi.international@spafurniture.in[/vc_column_text][vc_btn title="English" style="outline" color="chino" size="lg" align="center" css="" el_id="button-id"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row overlay_row="" el_class="headingSec"][vc_column width="1/3" el_class="headingLeft"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733484215514{margin-bottom: 15px !important;}"]

Our Products

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733402205989{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"]

Crafted till Perfection

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width="2/3" el_class="headingDesc"][vc_column_text css_animation="bottom-to-top" css=""]Explore our new collection, featuring high-end electric massage beds, specialized spa tables for Ayurvedic Treatments, Relaxation Loungers, Spa Trolleys, Foot Reflexology Chairs, and Pedicure Chairs. Each piece is meticulously crafted to enhance the ambience and functionality of your spa & salon.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row overlay_row="" el_class="productC"][vc_column][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg1" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="4731" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#massage-beds"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft productCat vMiddle" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733402228933{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"]

Massage Beds

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height="25px"][vc_column_text css=""]

Our Massage Table collection features many premium options to suit every professional need. From Electric Massage Beds, Portable Massage Table, Hydraulic Massage Tables, Wooden Massage Beds to Ayurvedic Treatment Tables and Low-Height Thai Massage Beds, we offer versatility and comfort. Our collection also includes Portable Massage Tables, Electric Treatment Beds for aesthetic clinics, and Facial Beds for salons and spas, ensuring superior quality for every treatment setting.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/massage-beds/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft productCat vMiddle" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733402254117{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"]

Spa Stools

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height="25px"][vc_column_text css=""]

Discover our premium collection of spa stools, pedicure stools, and therapist chairs for spa and aesthetic treatment rooms. We offer low-height pedicurist stools and folding therapist stools, all crafted for ultimate comfort, stability, durability, and style in your treatment space.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/spa-stools/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg3" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="1537" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#spa-stools"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg2" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="1970" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#spa-trolleys"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle headingLeft productCat" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733402278236{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"]

Spa Trolleys

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height="25px"][vc_column_text css=""]

Our Spa Trolley Collection offers versatile solutions for spas and aesthetic clinics. Choose from Massage Stone Heater Trolleys, Spa Carts  for Hot Cabi, Salon Trolleys, Barber Shop Trolleys, and Wooden Spa Trolleys, designed for easy mobility and efficient storage of all your spa essentials.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/spa-trolleys/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft productCat vMiddle" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733402305341{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"]

Pedicure & Manicure

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height="25px"][vc_column_text css=""]

Esthetica's Pedicure & Manicure range offers luxurious and functional solutions for nail professionals. Our collection includes Luxury Pedicure Chairs, Manicure Pedicure Chairs, Manicure Table, Professional Manicure Stations, and Compact Nail Tables designed for comfort and style. We also provide Pedicure Stations with and without plumbing options and ergonomic Pedicurist Chairs, ensuring the perfect setup for any salon or spa.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/manicure-pedicure-chairs/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg5" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="4703" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#pedicure-manicure"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg7" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="2685" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#loungers"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft productCat vMiddle" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733402332052{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"]

Loungers

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height="25px"][vc_column_text css=""]

Our Spa Relaxation Lounger range offers the perfect blend of comfort and style for any hotel and resort setting. Choose from luxurious wave loungers, outdoor poolside loungers, and indoor relaxation beds. Our electric indoor spa loungers feature an in-built heating function, a detachable reading light, and a convenient lateral shelf, providing ultimate relaxation and convenience for your spa or wellness space.

item.dc:creator: estheticaspafurniture
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content" full_height="yes" equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row="" el_class="proRotate home-page-graphic-for-nov"][vc_column el_class="vertMid"][vc_column_text css_animation="none"]
[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="bottom-to-top" el_class="proText"]
Featured Here The Shirodhara Massage Bed
[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row" parallax="content-moving" parallax_image="1439" overlay_row="" el_class="callAction1"][vc_column el_class="callBtn"][vc_column_text css="" el_id="div-1"]

الشركة الرائدة في تصنيع أثاث السبا الفاخر في الإمارات العربية المتحدة

تُعد إستيتيكا مُصنِّعًا ومورِّدًا رائدًا لأثاث السبا عالي الجودة في الإمارات العربية المتحدة. مع التزام قوي بالجودة والتصميم العصري، نقدم مجموعة متنوعة من المنتجات، بما في ذلك طاولات التدليك الفاخرة، وأسرّة التدليك الكهربائية، ومحطات البيديكير، وكراسي الاسترخاء في السبا، ومجموعة رائعة من أثاث صالونات التجميل. تتميز منتجاتنا بتقنيات متطورة، وميزات قابلة للتعديل، وتصاميم مريحة لضمان الراحة الوظيفية المثلى. يعمل الموزع المعتمد لدينا، ماضي انترناشيونال، في دبي وأبوظبي. تلتزم ماضي انترناشيونال بتوزيع وتعزيز عروضنا من أثاث السبا والصالونات عبر هذه المدن، لضمان وصول المنتجعات والصالونات الفاخرة إلى منتجاتنا العالية الجودة. دبي، الإمارات العربية المتحدة معرض ماضي انترناشيونال رقم 2، مبنى العويس، Port Saeed، ديرة، دبي، الإمارات العربية المتحدة. ص.ب: 56290 أبوظبي، الإمارات العربية المتحدة ماضي انترناشيونال لمستحضرات التجميل مبنىEIB  القديم، مقابل سيتي ترمينال منطقة الكورنيش السياحي، أبوظبي، الإمارات العربية المتحدة. ص.ب: 37785 للاستفسارات ولمزيد من المعلومات حول منتجاتنا، يُرجى التواصل معنا على madi.international@spafurniture.in[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css="" el_id="div-2"]

Leading Manufacturer of Premium Spa Furniture in the UAE

Esthetica is a premier manufacturer and supplier of high-quality spa furniture in the UAE. With a strong commitment to quality and modern design, we offer a diverse range of products, including premium massage tables, electric massage beds, pedicure stations, spa relaxation loungers, and an exquisite collection of salon furniture. Our products are equipped with sophisticated technologies, adjustable features, and ergonomic designs to ensure optimal comfort and functionality. Our authorized distributor, Madi International, operates in Dubai and Abu Dhabi. Madi International is dedicated to distributing and promoting our spa and salon furniture offerings across these cities, ensuring that luxury spas and salons have access to our premium-quality products.[/vc_column_text][vc_raw_html css="" el_id="div-3"][/vc_raw_html][vc_column_text css="" el_id="div-4"]For inquiries and further information about our products, please reach out to us at madi.international@spafurniture.in[/vc_column_text][vc_btn title="English" style="outline" color="chino" size="lg" align="center" css="" el_id="button-id"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row overlay_row="" el_class="headingSec"][vc_column width="1/3" el_class="headingLeft"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733478640220{margin-bottom: 10px !important;}"]

Our Products

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

Crafted till Perfection

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width="2/3" el_class="headingDesc"][vc_column_text css_animation="bottom-to-top" css=""]Explore our extensive collection, featuring high-end electric massage beds, specialized spa beds for Ayurvedic Treatments, Relaxation Loungers, Spa Stools, Spa Trolleys, Foot Reflexology Chairs, and Pedicure Chairs. Each piece is meticulously hand-crafted to enhance the ambience and functionality of your spa.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row overlay_row="" el_class="productC"][vc_column][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg1" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="4731" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#massage-beds"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft productCat vMiddle" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733383661276{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"]

Massage Beds

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height="25px"][vc_column_text css=""]

Our Massage Table collection features many premium options to suit every professional need. From Electric Massage Beds and Wooden Massage Beds to Ayurvedic Treatment Tables and Low-Height Thai Massage Beds, we offer versatility and comfort. Our collection also includes Portable Massage Tables, Electric Treatment Beds for aesthetic clinics, and Facial Beds for salons and spas, ensuring superior quality for every treatment setting.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/massage-beds/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft productCat vMiddle" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733383641433{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"]

Discover our premium collection of spa stools and therapist chairs for spa and aesthetic treatment rooms. We offer low-height pedicurist stools and folding therapist stools, all crafted for ultimate comfort, stability, durability, and style in your treatment space.

Spa Trolleys

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height="25px"][vc_column_text css=""]

Our Spa Trolley Collection offers versatile solutions for spas and aesthetic clinics. Choose from Massage Stone Heater Trolleys, Spa Carts  for Hot Cabi, Barber Shop Trolleys, and Wooden Spa Trolleys, designed for easy mobility and efficient storage of all your spa essentials.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/spa-trolleys/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft productCat vMiddle" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733383676892{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}" el_class="m_title"]

Pedicure & Manicure

Our collection includes Luxury Pedicure Chairs, Manicure Pedicure Chairs, Professional Manicure Stations, and Compact Nail Tables designed for comfort and style. We also provide Pedicure Stations with and without plumbing options and ergonomic Pedicurist Chairs, ensuring the perfect setup for any salon or spa.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/manicure-pedicure-chairs/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg5" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="4703" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#pedicure-manicure"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg7" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="2685" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#loungers"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft productCat vMiddle" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733383686660{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}" el_class="m_title"]

Loungers

Our Spa Relaxation Lounger range offers the perfect blend of comfort and style for any setting. Choose from luxurious wave loungers, outdoor poolside loungers, and indoor relaxation beds. Our electric indoor spa loungers feature an in-built heating function, a detachable reading light, and a convenient lateral shelf, providing ultimate relaxation and convenience for your spa or wellness space.

item.title: Qatar
item.dc:creator: estheticaspafurniture
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content" full_height="yes" equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row="" el_class="proRotate home-page-graphic-for-nov"][vc_column el_class="vertMid"][vc_column_text css_animation="none"]
[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="bottom-to-top" el_class="proText"]
Featured Here The Shirodhara Massage Bed
[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row" parallax="content-moving" parallax_image="1439" overlay_row="" el_class="callAction1"][vc_column el_class="callBtn"][vc_column_text css="" el_id="div-1"]

الشركة الرائدة في تصنيع أثاث السبا الفاخر في قطر

تُعتبر إستيتيكا واحدة من الشركات الرائدة في تصنيع وتوريد أثاث السبا عالي الجودة في قطر. مع التزامنا بالجودة والتصميم العصري، نقدم مجموعة متنوعة من المنتجات تشمل طاولات التدليك عالية الجودة، وأسرة التدليك الكهربائية، ومحطات البيديكير، وكراسي الاسترخاء في السبا، ومجموعة رائعة من أثاث صالونات التجميل. تتضمن منتجاتنا تقنيات متطورة، وميزات قابلة للتعديل، وخصائص مريحة لضمان الراحة والوظيفية. نفتخر بموزعنا المعتمد، ماضي انترناشيونال، في الدوحة. تلتزم ماضي انترناشيونال بتوزيع وتعزيز عروضنا من أثاث السبا والصالونات عبر قطر، لضمان وصول المنتجعات والصالونات الفاخرة إلى منتجاتنا عالية الجودة. معلومات الاتصال: ماضي انترناشيونال و.ل.ل. شارع السعد، الدوحة - قطر، ص.ب: 234412 للاستفسارات ولمزيد من المعلومات حول منتجاتنا، يُرجى التواصل معنا على madi.international@spafurniture.in[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css="" el_id="div-2"]

Leading Manufacturer of Premium Spa Furniture in Qatar

Esthetica is one of the leading manufacturers and suppliers of premium quality spa furniture in Qatar. With a commitment to quality and modern design, we offer a diverse product range that includes high-quality massage tables, electric massage beds, pedicure stations, spa relaxation loungers and an exquisite collection of salon furniture. Our products incorporate sophisticated technologies, adjustable features, and ergonomic features to ensure comfort and functionality. We take pride in our authorized distributor, Madi International, located in Doha. Madi International is dedicated to distributing and promoting our spa and salon furniture offerings across Qatar, ensuring that luxury spas and salons have access to our premium-quality products.[/vc_column_text][vc_raw_html css="" el_id="div-3"][/vc_raw_html][vc_column_text css="" el_id="div-4"]For inquiries and further information about our products, please reach out to us at madi.international@spafurniture.in[/vc_column_text][vc_btn title="English" style="outline" color="chino" size="lg" align="center" css="" el_id="button-id"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row overlay_row="" el_class="headingSec"][vc_column width="1/3" el_class="headingLeft"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733485360088{margin-bottom: 15px !important;}"]

Our Products

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css=".vc_custom_1733401877744{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"]

Crafted till Perfection

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][vc_column width="2/3" el_class="headingDesc"][vc_column_text css_animation="bottom-to-top" css=""]Explore our latest trending collection, featuring high-end electric massage beds, Ayurvedic Treatments, Relaxation Loungers, Spa Trolleys, Foot Reflexology Chairs, Manicure Stations, Pedicure Stools, Salon Furniture, and Pedicure Chairs. Each piece is diligently hand crafted to enhance the ambience and functionality of your spa and salon space.[/vc_column_text][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row overlay_row="" el_class="productC"][vc_column][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg1" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="4731" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#massage-beds"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft productCat vMiddle" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733401869672{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"]

Massage Beds

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height="25px"][vc_column_text css=""]

Esthetica's Massage Table collection features many premium options to suit every professional need. From Electric Massage Beds and Wooden Massage Beds to Ayurvedic Treatment Tables and Low-Height Thai Massage Beds, we offer versatility and comfort. Our collection also includes Portable Massage Tables, Electric Spa Treatment Beds for aesthetic clinics, and Facial Beds for salons and spas, ensuring superior quality for every treatment setting.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/massage-beds/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft productCat vMiddle" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733401858584{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"]

Spa Stools

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height="25px"][vc_column_text css=""]

Discover our premium collection of spa stools and therapist chairs for spa and aesthetic treatment rooms. We offer low-height pedicurist stools and folding therapist stools, all hand crafted for ultimate comfort, stability, durability, and style in your treatment space.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/spa-stools/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg3" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="1537" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#spa-stools"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg2" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="1970" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#spa-trolleys"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle headingLeft productCat" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733401850464{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"]

Spa Trolleys

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height="25px"][vc_column_text css=""]

Esthetica's Spa Trolley Collection offers versatile solutions for spas and aesthetic clinics. Choose from Massage Stone Heater Trolleys, Spa Carts  for Hot Cabi, Barber Shop Trolleys, and Wooden Spa Trolleys, designed for easy mobility and efficient storage of all your spa and beauty salon essentials.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/spa-trolleys/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft productCat vMiddle" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733401842833{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"]

Pedicure & Manicure

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height="25px"][vc_column_text css=""]

Esthetica's Pedicure & Manicure range offers luxurious and functional solutions for nail professionals. Our latest collection includes Luxury Pedicure Chairs, Manicure Pedicure Chairs, Professional Manicure Stations, and Compact Nail Tables designed for comfort and style. We also provide Pedicure Stations with and without plumbing options and ergonomic Pedicurist Chairs, ensuring the perfect setup for any salon or spa.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/manicure-pedicure-chairs/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg5" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="4703" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#pedicure-manicure"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg7" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="2685" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#loungers"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft productCat vMiddle" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733401830297{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"]

Loungers

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height="25px"][vc_column_text css=""]

Esthetica's Spa Relaxation Lounger range offers the perfect blend of comfort and style for any setting. Choose from luxurious wave loungers, outdoor poolside loungers, and indoor relaxation beds. Our electric indoor spa loungers feature an in-built heating function, a detachable reading light, and a convenient lateral shelf, providing ultimate relaxation and convenience for your spa or wellness space.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/spa-relaxation-loungers/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle headingLeft productCat" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733401822001{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"]

Salon Furniture

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height="25px"][vc_column_text css=""]

Discover our curated collection of premium salon furniture designed for both style and functionality. We offer Hair Styling Chairs, Bridal Chairs, Barber Chairs, Hair Color Trolleys, and Hair Wash Stations, each crafted to enhance the comfort and efficiency of your salon. Elevate your space with high-quality, durable modern salon chairs and shampoo stations that provide both luxury and practicality for every client and professional need.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/salon-furniture/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg4" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="3935" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#salon-furniture"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_separator color="custom" el_width="80" accent_color="#f4ede9"][vc_row_inner equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle proImg6" width="1/2"][vc_single_image image="3941" img_size="full" alignment="center" onclick="custom_link" css_animation="bottom-to-top" link="https://www.spafurniture.in/products/#accessories"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="vMiddle headingLeft productCat" width="1/2"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733401814289{margin-bottom: 0px !important;}"]

Accessories

[/vc_column_text][vc_empty_space height="25px"][vc_column_text css=""]

Esthetica's Spa Accessories Collection offers essential equipment for seamless spa operations treatment. From Massage Stone Heaters and Hot Towel Cabinets to Tibetan Singing Bowls and Aroma Oil Burners, we provide everything you need, including Massage Stones, Service Trays, Brass & Copper Bowls, Electric Table Warmers, and premium Spa Linen. Enhance your spa experience with our high-quality, functional accessories.

[/vc_column_text][wolfe_button text_button="See Collection" url_button="https://www.spafurniture.in/spa-accessories/" choose_border="no_border" border_radius=""][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row" equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" parallax="content-moving" parallax_image="1484" overlay_row="" el_class="specialSec"][vc_column el_class="headingLeft center"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733485465743{margin-bottom: 15px !important;}"]

Our Speciality

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css=".vc_custom_1733485505839{margin-bottom: 15px !important;}"]

Customised to your aesthetics

Our manufacturing unit empowers you to personalize your furniture down to the last detail. Choose from a spread of wood stain colours and upholstery options to create a piece that smoothly integrates with your space. We can even customize the sizes as per your space requirements.
[/vc_column_text][vc_row_inner overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="centerBox" width="1/6" offset="vc_col-sm-offset-2 vc_col-xs-4"][vc_single_image image="1893" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="bottom-to-top"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="centerBox" width="1/6" offset="vc_col-sm-offset-1 vc_col-xs-4"][vc_single_image image="1895" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="bottom-to-top"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="centerBox" width="1/6" offset="vc_col-sm-offset-1 vc_col-xs-4"][vc_single_image image="1894" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="bottom-to-top"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content" equal_height="yes" overlay_row="" el_class="headingSec howWhat"][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft center"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=".vc_custom_1733485542958{margin-bottom: 15px !important;}"]

How we do

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css=".vc_custom_1733485808275{margin-bottom: 15px !important;}"]

What we do

Esthetica specializes in the precision manufacturing of high-end spa tables and massage bed ranges, offering a comprehensive range of products tailored for hotel and resort spas. Our cutting-edge manufacturing facility boasts a modern setup. Esthetica handles every aspect of the manufacturing process with meticulous care and expertise. Your vision is our priority, and our capabilities span the entire spectrum of furniture production.

Accessories

OUR SPECIALITY

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css="" el_class="custom-content"]

Customised to your aesthetics

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css="" el_class="custom-content"]

Our manufacturing unit empowers you to personalize your furniture down to the last detail. Choose from a spectrum of wood stain colours and upholstery options to create a piece that seamlessly integrates with your space. We can even customise the sizes as per your space requirements.

[/vc_column_text][vc_row_inner overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="centerBox" width="1/6" offset="vc_col-sm-offset-2 vc_col-xs-4"][vc_single_image image="1893" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="bottom-to-top"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="centerBox" width="1/6" offset="vc_col-sm-offset-1 vc_col-xs-4"][vc_single_image image="1895" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="bottom-to-top"][/vc_column_inner][vc_column_inner el_class="centerBox" width="1/6" offset="vc_col-sm-offset-1 vc_col-xs-4"][vc_single_image image="1894" img_size="full" alignment="center" css_animation="bottom-to-top"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content" equal_height="yes" overlay_row="" el_class="headingSec howWhat"][vc_column][vc_row_inner content_placement="middle" overlay_row=""][vc_column_inner el_class="headingLeft center"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

HOW WE DO

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

What We Do

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

Esthetica specializes in precision manufacturing luxury spa furniture, including high-end spa tables, massage bed ranges, spa treatment tables, and Ayurveda tables. We offer a comprehensive range of products tailored for hotel and resort spas. Our cutting-edge manufacturing facility boasts a modern setup. Esthetica handles every aspect of the manufacturing process with meticulous care and expertise. Your vision is our priority, and our capabilities span the entire spectrum of furniture production.

[/vc_column_text][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][vc_row_inner overlay_row="" el_class="project-sec"][vc_column_inner][wolfe_client_logos autoplay_timeout="5000" img_ids="5355,5356,5357,5358,5359,5360,5361,5362,5363,5364,5365,5366,5367,5368,5369,5370,5371,5372,5373,5374,5375,5376,5377,5378,5379,5380,5381,5382,5383,5384,5385,5386,5387,5388,5389,5390,5391,5392,5393"][/vc_column_inner][/vc_row_inner][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row full_width="stretch_row" equal_height="yes" content_placement="middle" overlay_row="" el_class="clientsSec"][vc_column css=".vc_custom_1465560529987{padding-bottom: 40px !important;}" el_class="headingLeft center"][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

OUR CLIENTS

[/vc_column_text][vc_column_text css_animation="fadeInUp" css=""]

Across The Globe

item.title: Massage Beds
item.dc:creator: estheticaspafurniture
item.content:encoded:
[vc_row full_width="stretch_row_content" el_class="product-pages"][vc_column][vc_raw_html css="" el_class="custom-filter"][/vc_raw_html][ess_grid alias="grid-2"][/vc_column][/vc_row][vc_row][vc_column][vc_column_text css="" el_class="section-div-p"]

Welcome to SPA Furniture: Your Premier Destination for Massage Beds in UAE

At SPA Furniture, we specialize in crafting high-quality massage beds in UAE designed to elevate comfort, functionality, and professionalism in spas, wellness centers, salons, and therapy clinics. Our wide range of products caters to every requirement, from versatile electric tables to classic manual beds, ensuring your clients enjoy an exceptional experience while providing therapists with ergonomic, reliable solutions. We understand that every wellness environment is unique, and our solutions are tailored to meet diverse operational needs without compromising on quality or aesthetics.

Explore Our Range of Massage Beds in UAE

Electric Massage Bed in UAE

Our electric massage bed in UAE models are designed for premium convenience and flexibility. With smooth electric adjustments for height, backrest, and leg sections, therapists can customize positions according to client needs. The silent operation ensures uninterrupted relaxation, making these beds ideal for high-end spas, physiotherapy clinics, and wellness centers.

Manual and Hydraulic Massage Tables

For clients seeking cost-effective yet durable options, our massage table in UAE range includes manual and hydraulic models. These beds offer strong frames, comfortable padding, and easy height adjustments, making them suitable for traditional spa setups or smaller therapy rooms.

Low-Height and Traditional Massage Beds

Designed for Thai massage or other traditional therapies, low-height massage beds provide easy access and mobility for therapists. The ergonomic design supports authentic treatment techniques while keeping clients comfortable throughout the session.

Portable Massage Tables

For mobile therapists or home service providers, our portable massage beds offer stability and durability without sacrificing convenience. Lightweight yet robust, these tables can be transported effortlessly, making them perfect for temporary setups or events.

Specialized Massage Beds

We also provide beds designed for prenatal care, Reiki, and holistic therapies. Each table is crafted to support unique treatments, ensuring client comfort and professional functionality.

Customization Options

At SPA Furniture, being one of the best massage bed manufacturers in UAE, we understand that every spa or wellness center has unique requirements. That’s why we offer extensive customization options for our massage beds for sale UAE, including:
  • Adjustable sizes and dimensions to fit your space
  • Choice of upholstery color and material
  • Frame finishes and materials
  • Optional accessories like armrests, headrests, or storage solutions
Our team works with clients to design a massage bed that meets both functional and aesthetic needs.

High-Quality Materials and Craftsmanship

Durability and comfort are at the heart of our products. Each massage bed in UAE is built using premium materials, including reinforced steel or high-quality wood frames and dense foam padding. The upholstery is resistant to oils, lotions, and frequent cleaning, ensuring hygiene and longevity. Our skilled craftsmen focus on precision, stability, and attention to detail, creating massage tables that can withstand daily professional use while providing a luxurious feel for clients.

Why Choose SPA Furniture?

At SPA Furniture, we understand that a high-quality massage bed is the cornerstone of any professional wellness or therapy setup. Our products combine comfort, durability, and functionality to elevate both client experience and therapist efficiency. Here’s why SPA Furniture is the preferred choice in the UAE:
  1. Professional Quality: Our massage beds in UAE meet international standards for safety, strength, and comfort, ensuring stability and reliable performance for all treatments.
  2. Expertise: With years of experience, we design massage tables that are ergonomic, client-friendly, and optimized for smooth workflow in spas, salons, and wellness centers.
  3. Customization Options: Flexible options allow you to select dimensions, upholstery colors, and optional features like armrests or storage, tailoring your bed to your space and style.
  4. Reliable Support: From guidance and delivery to after-sales service, our team ensures a seamless purchase experience, helping you make a confident investment.
  5. Trusted Supplier: SPA Furniture is recognized across the UAE for professional-grade, long-lasting spa and therapy equipment, making us a reliable partner for wellness businesses.
Choosing SPA Furniture means investing in high-quality, ergonomic, and durable massage beds that enhance your services while creating a premium experience for clients.

Massage Bed Price in UAE – What to Expect

The massage bed price UAE varies depending on the type, features, and material. Manual models are cost-effective, while advanced electric massage tables in UAE may be priced higher due to multi-motor adjustments and premium finishes. Investing in high-quality beds ensures longevity, reduces maintenance costs, and provides better service experiences for clients. SPA Furniture offers competitive pricing across all ranges without compromising quality.

Industries We Serve

SPA Furniture caters to a wide variety of industries across the UAE, including:
  • Luxury and boutique spas
  • Physiotherapy and chiropractic clinics
  • Beauty salons and wellness studios
  • Hotel and resort spa facilities
  • Mobile therapy practitioners
Each sector benefits from our professional-grade massage beds, designed to meet industry-specific needs.

Upgrade Your Wellness Space with SPA Furniture

Choosing the right massage bed for sale UAE is crucial for enhancing client experience and therapist efficiency. SPA Furniture provides versatile, durable, and ergonomic beds designed to meet professional standards in any spa, clinic, or wellness environment. Whether you are looking for a manual massage table, a premium electric massage bed in UAE, or a portable solution, we have options to meet every requirement. Contact SPA Furniture today to explore our range of professional massage beds in UAE and create the perfect wellness environment for your clients!

FAQs

  1. What types of massage beds are available in UAE? SPA Furniture offers manual, hydraulic, electric, low-height, portable, and specialized massage tables for professional use.
  2. How do I choose between a manual and electric massage bed? Electric beds are ideal for spas requiring motorized adjustments and advanced features, while manual beds are cost-effective and reliable for basic treatments.
  3. Can I customize the massage bed dimensions and color? Yes, SPA Furniture provides customization for frame finishes, upholstery colors, dimensions, and optional accessories to fit your workspace.
  4. How long do professional massage beds last? High-quality beds with proper maintenance can last over 10 years, even in daily commercial use.
  5. Are SPA Furniture beds suitable for all spa treatments? Yes, our beds are designed to accommodate general massages, Thai therapy, Reiki, prenatal, and other specialized treatment.
